case_title: EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK vs. BOSTON DELI GROUP INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON DELI GROUP INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF OF PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMIJNG AWARD OF ARBITRATOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK SERVED SEP-28-1995, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON DELI GROUP INC. CARDIN, FREDERICK A.
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON DELI GROUP INC. CARDIN, FREDERICK A.
ORDER CONFIRMING AWARD OF ARBITRATOR-GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY #2
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $560.72 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON DELI GROUP INC. CARDIN, FREDERICK A.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EUREKABANK, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSTON DELI GROUP INC. CARDIN, FREDERICK A. $9,981.45 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,061.45, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR DEFENDANTS TO EACH PAY $250, PLUS INTEREST ON THE PRINCIPAL AT 10% FROM 25-MAY-95.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,365.87 AS TO DEFENDANT BOSTON DELI GROUP INC. CARDIN, FREDERICK A.
